changeSet.author: gfh
changeSet.sql: INSERT INTO audit_log (timestamp, user_id, user_name, action, entity_type, entity_id, new_value, ip_address, user_agent) VALUES (NOW() - INTERVAL '3 minutes', 1, 'admin@gfh.kg', 'LOGIN', NULL, NULL, NULL, '10.0.0.1', 'Mozilla/5.0'), (NOW() - INTERVAL '12 minutes', 1, 'admin@gfh.kg', 'UPDATE_USER', 'User', 7, '{"isActive":true}'::jsonb, '10.0.0.1', 'Mozilla/5.0'), (NOW() - INTERVAL '28 minutes', 6, 'zhanara.bakirova@gfh.kg', 'LOGIN', NULL, NULL, NULL, '10.0.0.42', 'Mozilla/5.0'), (NOW() - INTERVAL '47 minutes', 6, 'zhanara.bakirova@gfh.kg', 'SUBMIT_EVAL', 'Evaluation', 41, '{"status":"SUBMITTED"}'::jsonb, '10.0.0.42', 'Mozilla/5.0'), (NOW() - INTERVAL '1 hour 5 minutes', 1, 'admin@gfh.kg', 'CREATE_PERIOD', 'EvaluationPeriod', 5, '{"type":"MONTHLY"}'::jsonb, '10.0.0.1', 'Mozilla/5.0'), (NOW() - INTERVAL '1 hour 32 minutes', 9, 'nurgul.kasymova@gfh.kg', 'LOGIN', NULL, NULL, NULL, '10.0.0.18', 'Mozilla/5.0'), (NOW() - INTERVAL '2 hours 10 minutes', 9, 'nurgul.kasymova@gfh.kg', 'SUBMIT_EVAL', 'Evaluation', 48, '{"status":"SUBMITTED"}'::jsonb, '10.0.0.18', 'Mozilla/5.0'), (NOW() - INTERVAL '2 hours 48 minutes', 1, 'admin@gfh.kg', 'UPDATE_CRITERIA','Criteria', 3, '{"weight":0.25}'::jsonb, '10.0.0.1', 'Mozilla/5.0'), (NOW() - INTERVAL '3 hours 20 minutes', 11, 'timur.aliev@gfh.kg', 'LOGIN', NULL, NULL, NULL, '10.0.0.27', 'Mozilla/5.0'), (NOW() - INTERVAL '4 hours 5 minutes', 11, 'timur.aliev@gfh.kg', 'RESPOND_APPEAL','Appeal', 2, '{"status":"UPHELD"}'::jsonb, '10.0.0.27', 'Mozilla/5.0'), (NOW() - INTERVAL '5 hours 15 minutes', 1, 'admin@gfh.kg', 'CREATE_USER', 'User', 30, '{"role":"EMPLOYEE"}'::jsonb, '10.0.0.1', 'Mozilla/5.0'), (NOW() - INTERVAL '6 hours 40 minutes', 14, 'svetlana.ivanova@gfh.kg','LOGIN', NULL, NULL, NULL, '10.0.0.33', 'Mozilla/5.0'), (NOW() - INTERVAL '8 hours 12 minutes', 1, 'admin@gfh.kg', 'DELETE_DELEGATION','EvaluatorDelegation', 4, NULL, '10.0.0.1', 'Mozilla/5.0'), (NOW() - INTERVAL '10 hours', 5, 'elmira.tursunova@gfh.kg','SUBMIT_APPEAL','Appeal', 3, '{"status":"PENDING"}'::jsonb, '10.0.0.51', 'Mozilla/5.0'), (NOW() - INTERVAL '13 hours', 1, 'admin@gfh.kg', 'UPDATE_SETTINGS','SystemSetting', 2, '{"key":"DEADLINE_DAYS"}'::jsonb, '10.0.0.1', 'Mozilla/5.0'), (NOW() - INTERVAL '17 hours', 3, 'bakyt.zhunusov@gfh.kg','LOGIN', NULL, NULL, NULL, '10.0.0.9', 'Mozilla/5.0'), (NOW() - INTERVAL '20 hours', 1, 'admin@gfh.kg', 'CREATE_CRITERIA','Criteria', 8, '{"name":"Качество"}'::jsonb, '10.0.0.1', 'Mozilla/5.0'), (NOW() - INTERVAL '23 hours', 1, 'admin@gfh.kg', 'LOGIN', NULL, NULL, NULL, '10.0.0.1', 'Mozilla/5.0');
